reviews.review_description: This was the leading platform no longer with us much loved by all of us that called it home and community . Now we’re spread out across the metaverse and growing and still together . Altspace forever. ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

The best app for socializing. It was authentic, full of actual adults in the spaces. I despise jumping into lobbies full of children. Even in VR they do not know how to act. I miss you Altspace! Forever in my heart!

I miss Altspace... I swear I met more adult people in this space than meta-world or rec room!! It was absolutely the best Karaoke rooms and places to visit and chill.... I think it should be brought back

This was the best space in VR. You could open up YouTube on it and do karaoke like that so people could hear you and the music. It was more interactive than recroom, horizons, and vrchat. The worlds I built were phenomenal and so easy to do compared to all the other social world building games. I think about you every day Altspace. RIP.
If I would have known it was going to go away I would have never got into vr. No other app is as good as altspace

It was my first time in the game and I was just experimenting with a couple of other users that is also new to it and there was a women being rude because we were asking questions and she was basically saying she was on some server and myself and the others started to take pictures we started to head over towards her while she was talking to another user there was a kid getting close to her and backing up repeatedly and she was like “move now I’m not playing with you move or I will kick you from the server” I said that’s a little boy and we had some questions about the game and she said “back up I’m talking to a new user” I replied saying we are all new we just had some questions and before I can even apologize if she felt that I was being rude the game shut down and now every time I try to click on it the game loads but I see no menu and then it crashes 

So basically y’all gotta do something about that no one was being rude in any way but she had a rude tone and had a disrespectful tone
I was banned for being to young EVEN THO I HAD GUARDIAN PERMISSION TO PLAY THE GAME AND IM SORRY I WAS NOT BORN WHEN YOU WANTED ME TO!!!!

developer_response.body: Hi, please contact our Support for account age related issues: http://altvr.com/support

reviews.review_description:
This is a great covid app or great app for people who can't leave their house or are introverts. Plenty of events to attend and socialize and being as you're doing it as an avatar it really helps with social anxiety. I had absolutely zero issues creating an account and logging in and there's plenty to do in the app. Best social app for the oculus.

My only complaint is that worlds can't be locked. I join worlds that someone took their time create for a specific purpose, like meditation and support groups and trolls come in. Would be nice if the world owner had an option to lock the doors so no one else could join. Or maybe even a locked door with a pass code thst the world owner could private message group members so if they come late they can still join.
Admins are trash and I think there should be a zero star option since it’s trash. And don’t even tell me to go to the “mod team” cause they will probably do nothing. Altspace is trash!

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry to hear that - please reach out to our Support team and let us know what happened http://altvr.com/support

reviews.review_description: After only 30 minutes of playing this game it logged me out if the game and wouldn't let me play it again. Other than that everything about the game is amazing and I 10/10 recommended it!

reviews.review_title: Much better than other VR socials
reviews.review_description:
My first time in this app someone friended me as a noob and showed me the ropes. This then I have met other friends, have joined games like cards against humanity and watched comedy shows. 
The user is much more mature compared to other VR socials which is a refreshing g change as conversation is more meaningful. Definitely recommend
Its. A good app to socialize with people you need to get it pls.

developer_response.body: Hey everettsmachine. We're so glad you're enjoying your time in AltspaceVR! Thanks so much for the great feedback.

reviews.review_description: I have been trying to create an account or log in for a week now.  No matter what I do or who helps nothing has worked.  Not worth the stress.  I got this game system as a early 51st birthday gift.  It was suppose to be another way to interact with my kids and grandkids but it’s just frustrating.  😩  Maricella

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry to hear that you ran into this issue :( 

We've just fixed a bug related to this and you should be able to get in - if not, please reach out to our Support @ http://altvr.com/support

reviews.review_description:
So while many of the reviews have replies that say the login issues are 'fixed' …they aren't. I just tried it. You still are forced to remove the headset, go to your mobile device, walk through the login, go back to the headset and enter the code... which fails. Says it's 'expired' even though it just gave it to me.

What a horrible, horrible user experience. Shame on whoever developed this, shame on the managers who approved this type of fix, shame on anyone who thinks this is an acceptable workflow for VR users.

This really is a great game, I got to reflect and talk with real people. This is an amazing concept, Devs do their jobs, mods to, The beginning person a lady named donna was a big help. I really love this

developer_response.body: Hi Tyso3600. So happy that you're having a great time! Thanks so much for checking out AltspaceVR, writing a lovely review, and helping spread the word to others. We're so glad to have you in our community.

reviews.review_description:
Hi,

So as a Oculus Quest User I didn't expect so many bugs.

1) will not work behind many firewalls (eduroam for instance)
2) you cannot login (open the keyboard) behind a firewall even if the app loads fine
3) microphone muting doesn't work at all (wtf?)

developer_response.body: Hey VRdawg.eth. Thanks for the feedback. We're always happy to investigate any bugs you may be experiencing. In the future, you can flag them for us at altvr.com/feedback/ Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Concept is good , Execution not so much
reviews.review_description:
I want to like it. But you attend scheduled events 

Example) A comedy ever tonight promising standup comics where there is no talent performing.  I don't expect true headliners, I would have been okay with amatures; but instead no one, only a small group of people having a private conversation in the corner, I have to assume they were the moderators

The Christmas open mic room was semi-cool expect the moderators kept telling everyone the rules and how they will eject you if you break them. Also mind you everyone was very well behaved. 

I do like the concept, there is polish needed. And maybe less rooms that can get everyone into a handful of places. 

I'll check in every once in a while and update my review accordingly.

developer_response.body:
Hi Brandon, thanks for the review. Our community hosts events of all kinds, so there will be various types of standup comedy events for example. While you may not have enjoyed the one you attended, there are several to choose from throughout the week that may appeal to you :) There's quite a bit of variety these days in our events, all created by the community!

Have a great day!

reviews.review_description: I love this game cause its a good multiplayer game where you can chat with friends and even make new ones!!

developer_response.body: Hey Curious_Sims! Hooray! Thank you for sharing your kind feedback with us. We're so happy to know you're having fun and meeting cool new people.

reviews.review_description: Nice but can be even better if they had more icebreaker games for ppl to play together. Karaoke, better music that we could actually choose, etc.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We're always adding things and updating AltspaceVR, stay tuned for more this year :)

reviews.review_description:
Update: I changed my review after my experience with customer service. Please reach out if you feel there was a misunderstanding with a ban. I had a very good experience and the issue was resolved. Now I realize it was simply a matter of keeping the community safe, as my son and myself both have “young” voices. My account was restored.

We are brand new to VR. We have all been home quarantining with COVID and thought this would pass the time. My 13 year old son was banned while under my supervision. He did nothing inappropriate, other than roasting marshmallows at the camp fire. Is that worthy of being banned? And reading the info 13 year olds can play under the supervision of an adult? Again, I don’t think this is fair to new users who are just getting used to VR. I found several people helpful in helping us navigate technical issues but being banned as brand new users is making me think twice about having this downloaded and I am very disappointed. It doesn’t seem I am alone in this.
